prompt: Should Reveal charge for community access in v1?
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Perceived fairness UX
nodes.details: If any gate appears, she must understand why instantly — no surprise locks mid-join.

nodes.label: Upgrade without shame
nodes.details: Upgrade moment (if any) is a calm choice surface, never a blocked empty feed that feels punitive.

nodes.label: Guest vs member states
nodes.details: Design distinct empty/preview/member states so permissioning is legible before she invests emotion.

nodes.label: Paywall trust break
nodes.details: A hard paywall on first home risks breaking the no-shame join path the product promised.
nodes.strategicAnswer: Don't invent a paywall that breaks trust.

nodes.label: Free-first interaction
nodes.details: Default experience should let her belong first; paid can be a later optional layer in the UI.
